text:
Under a moon streaked orange.

Three siblings. One night.

They talk.

Why trees?

Because everything grows faster.



They ride bikes.

Into town.



There's music.

Something ancient.

They listen.

Moments.

Everything happens.

Moments fade.



Later.



They talk.

Maybe.



Maybe nowhere.










Just somewhere.



Just somewhere.



Away.



Just somewhere.



Away.




That's goodbye.



Just somewhere.



Just somewhere.



Silent.




They laugh.



Just somewhere.




Just somewhere.



Thought.

Different.



Never.



That.



Just somewhere.




Just somewhere.




And goodbye.




Just somewhere.





Just somewhere..





My friends.



Just somewhere.





What?







Just somewhere.



No place.





Just somewhere.



Okay.



Just somewhere.



Just somewhere.



A kiss.



Just somewhere.



Just somewhen.



Maybe.



That.



Just somewhere.


Just somewhere.





Just somewhere.

Just somewhere.





Just.



Just somewhere.





That's nice.



Just somewhere.







Oh.



Just somewhere.



Okay.



Just somewhere.



Just somewhere.



Just somewhere
